title: The Organizer
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Mario Monicelli
actors: Marcello Mastroianni, Renato Salvatori, Gabriella Giorgelli
plot: A former high school teacher turned unionist tries to organize workers laboring with inhuman conditions at a late 19th Century textile factory.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 6 wins & 9 nominations total
